title: Monday storage persistent error

posts.author: linhle (Linh Le)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve been having a consistent issue for the past couple of days. I have this code:

import { Storage } from '@mondaycom/apps-sdk';
const storage = new Storage(shortLivedToken);

const now = Date.now();
await storage.set(key, now);
...
const response = await storage.get(key);

when I log response I see this often:

  "response": {
    "success": true,
    "value": "[Undefined]",
    "version": "[Undefined]"
  },

a normal good response looks like:

{
  "response": {
    "success": true,
    "value": "1730228717706",
    "version": "3e283"
  },

Am I doing anything wrong here? This issue doesn’t happen 100% of the time but quite often.

posts.author: linhle (Linh Le)
posts.cookedHtml: if shortLivedToken has expired, I would expect a thrown error or something explicit about it, not such a response indicating success.

posts.author: linhle (Linh Le)
posts.cookedHtml: My suspicion is the key-value store implements eventual consistency, where successful reads might return undefined values while changes propagate across the distributed system. So the value is undefined.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: You are correct, its likely the eventual consistency.
